domains.name: Domain 1: Monitoring, Logging, Analysis, Remediation, and Performance Optimization

questions.text: The DevOps team is automating releases and must collect metrics and logs from EC2 and AWS services. Which design fits best? collect metrics and logs from EC2 and AWS services.

options.text: CloudWatch cross-account observability or Centralized logging

questions.explanation: CloudWatch is the primary monitoring service.

questions.text: An audit found gaps: the organization must run operational tasks like patching at scale. Which option addresses this? run operational tasks like patching at scale.

options.text: CloudWatch cross-account observability or Centralized logging

questions.text: A hybrid environment must support a goal to aggregate logs across accounts without changing application code. What should you implement? aggregate logs across accounts.

options.text: CloudWatch cross-account observability or Centralized logging

questions.explanation: Observability links accounts for unified views.

questions.text: A company needs to trace API calls for troubleshooting. Which option meets the requirement with the LEAST implementation effort? trace API calls for troubleshooting.
For cost and security, the team must capture VPC traffic metadata. What is the recommended approach? capture VPC traffic metadata.

options.text: Packet sniff all prod without policy

questions.explanation: Flow Logs capture IP traffic metadata.

questions.text: After a design review, leadership requires the team to use synthetic canaries to monitor endpoints. Which approach is MOST reliable? use synthetic canaries to monitor endpoints.
questions.explanation: Canaries run scheduled tests against URLs.

questions.explanation: Config tracks resource configuration over time.

questions.explanation: AWS Backup applies plans to multiple resources.

questions.text: During peak traffic, the platform team must replicate servers to AWS for DR with minimal downtime. What should they do FIRST? replicate servers to AWS for DR with minimal downtime.
questions.explanation: Elastic DR replicates and orchestrates failover.

questions.text: Which TWO practices align with the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Select TWO.)

options.text: Design for failure and automate recovery
Use single-AZ for all production data stores

questions.text: Which are AWS services used for encryption or key management? (Select TWO.)
questions.explanation: KMS manages keys; Secrets Manager stores and rotates secrets.
